name: fanuc-payload-a
description: Extract payload data from a FANUC R-2000iC robot backup. The backup contains VR files but no direct payload information.

setup.repo_state: FANUC robot backup directory with VR files
setup.error_message: Cannot read payload data from FANUC backup: VR files are in proprietary binary format, not human-readable

fix_commands: Use kcontrans converter to transform VR files to VA format
Parse VA file to extract payload variables
Map variable indices to payload names
